title: Pix Vulka Optimizations
description:
⚠️【警告】
请手动安装VulkanMod Android支持库模组后再运行，否则会立即崩溃。

⚠️[Warning]
Please manually install the VulkanMod Android support library mod before running, otherwise it will crash immediately.
body:
# ⚠️ For Minecraft 1.20.1, VulkanMod does NOT work on the latest mobile launchers (incompatible with LWJGL 3.3.6). PC players are unaffected. Please use an older launcher version or switch to 1.21.1.

## Pix Vulka Optimization✨

Make VulkanMod Run Buttery Smooth on Your Phone

This is a dedicated optimization pack built for VulkanMod, designed to unlock the full potential of the Vulkan graphics API and deliver a smoother, more stable Minecraft experience on Vulkan-supported devices.

✨ What It Does For You

· 🚀 Boosts FPS & Reduces Lag – Enjoy buttery-smooth gameplay, even on older hardware
· ⚡ Faster Launch Times – Less waiting, more playing
· 🌡️ Cooler & More Efficient – Lower heat and battery drain, so you can play longer

🎯 Key Features

· Minimal changes to core game content, keeping the vanilla feel
· Ultra-lightweight mod selection to cut down on load overhead
· Supports Fold Craft Launcher, ZalithLauncher, and most custom launchers

📱 Will It Work On My Phone?

As long as your device supports Vulkan 1.2, chances are this optimization pack will run smoothly on your device.
If your graphics drivers meet the requirement, you'll be able to enjoy the full performance boost that VulkanMod has to offer.

This integration pack is intended for ZalithLauncher/Fold Craft Launcher. For issues or suggestions, please join the QQ channel: PixABoost1798.
